I've seen Wranglers with way more miles and wear than this one, and they don't even come close to the condition of this fine example.

Has this vehicle ever been involved in an accident, even a minor fender bender? And has the frame ever been bent, repaired, or replaced? I'm looking for specifics, not general reassurances.
